title: marsdenia hainanensis
intro: Marsdenia hainanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Hainan milk vine. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and anti-cancer effects. The health benefits of Marsdenia hainanensis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as showing potential in treating certain types of cancer and viral infections. Herbal preparations of Marsdenia hainanensis typically involve drying and processing the leaves or stems, which can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal use.
